contentList.content: Prevented from <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BURNING">Burning</LSTag>. <LSTag Tooltip="Resistant">Resistant</LSTag> to Fire damage. Lightning Spell <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> against wet targets have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag>. Cold spells reduces <LSTag Tooltip="Movementspeed">movementspeed</LSTag> by 3m.
This entity resists Radiant damage, and reflects such damage as Necrotic energy.
